scenes.ssml_text: <speak><prosody rate="medium" pitch="+5%">In the beginning, the gods gathered in the great Hall of Stars.</prosody><break time="800ms"/>Among them, a goddess named Arin shaped the destinies of mortals and immortals alike.<break time="1s"/>Legends say she gave birth to time itself.</speak>

<speak><prosody rate="medium" pitch="+5%">As ages passed, Arin became but a shadow.</prosody><break time="700ms"/>The sacred temple had fallen to ruins.<break time="800ms"/>Yet those who wandered close claimed to hear the faint hum of threads.</speak>
